description: A bay thoroughbred horse in full gallop races across an open field with a jockey astride wearing a red jacket, cream breeches, black boots, and a dark cap. The horse's legs are fully extended in an exaggerated flying gallop characteristic of eighteenth-century sporting art. In the background stands a large brick building, likely a stable or racing lodge, beneath a hazy yellow-green sky. The flat landscape stretches to the horizon with a distant white structure visible at far right.
